title: Back up Teknic SD motor parameters before replacement
summary: Use the Teknic manufacturer software to connect to a Teknic SD motor and save its custom parameters before motor or gearbox replacement work proceeds. The source identifies required tools, download selections, and the need to preserve parameters for Teknic SD motors used on the Z-axis and A-axis.
when_to_use: Use before replacing a Teknic SD motor, and when preparing for related gearbox replacement work involving Teknic SD motors on the Z-axis or A-axis where the motor's custom parameters must be preserved.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a motor removal or installation procedure; the supplied source content does not provide those steps.
Do not use this runbook when the task does not require saving Teknic SD motor custom parameters before replacement.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Gather required tools and PPE, identify the correct Teknic SD motor, connect to the motor, download the Teknic software with the specified selections, and save the motor's custom parameters before replacement work.

safety_notes: Use caution when lifting because components may be heavy.
Use safety glasses and gloves as listed in the source-backed tools and PPE.

access_required: Access to the Teknic downloads website
Access to the Teknic SD motor to be replaced
system_preconditions: The Teknic SD motor to be worked on has been identified.
Required power supply and communication accessories are available so the motor can be accessed by the manufacturer application.
Parameter backup is performed before replacement work proceeds.

visual_references.description: Figure 7-5 identifying the Teknic SD motor referenced in the software download and parameter save preparation.
Page 122 maintenance diagram likely showing the motor USB access point used to connect the motor to a laptop for configuration transfer.

steps.title: Review lifting caution and prepare for handling
steps.purpose: Reduce injury or equipment damage risk before handling motor or gearbox-related components.
steps.instruction: Use caution when lifting because components may be heavy.
steps.expected_result: The technician is aware of the lifting hazard before proceeding.
steps.healthy_condition: Heavy components are handled cautiously and no unsafe lifting condition is observed.
steps.failure_condition: A component cannot be handled safely or the lifting risk is not controlled.

actions.label: Review lifting hazard
actions.exact_action: Use caution when lifting because components may be heavy.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the component cannot be handled safely.
Escalate if safe handling of heavy components cannot be ensured.

source_evidence.text: Use caution when lifting because components may be heavy.

steps.title: Gather required tools, PPE, and connection hardware
steps.purpose: Ensure all source-listed items needed for parameter backup and related replacement preparation are available.
steps.instruction: Gather the listed items: replacement Teknic SD motor, safety glasses, gloves, torque wrench, 4-mm hex wrench, 5-mm hex wrench, 3/8-in. wrench/socket, laptop, USB-A to micro-USB cable, 25-V power supply, 75-V power supply, 4-pin Molex power supply connector, and 8-pin Molex communication cable.
steps.expected_result: All listed PPE, tools, and connection accessories are available before attempting to connect to the motor.
steps.healthy_condition: All required items are present and ready for use.
steps.failure_condition: One or more required items are missing, preventing safe preparation or motor connection.

actions.label: Verify required items
actions.exact_action: Gather the listed items: replacement Teknic SD motor, safety glasses, gloves, torque wrench, 4-mm hex wrench, 5-mm hex wrench, 3/8-in. wrench/socket, laptop, USB-A to micro-USB cable, 25-V power supply, 75-V power supply, 4-pin Molex power supply connector, and 8-pin Molex communication cable.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if required PPE, tools, or cables are not available.
Escalate if the required power supply or communication hardware needed to access the motor is unavailable.

source_evidence.text: Gather the listed items: replacement Teknic SD motor, safety glasses, gloves, torque wrench, 4-mm hex wrench, 5-mm hex wrench, 3/8-in. wrench/socket, laptop, USB-A to micro-USB cable, 25-V power supply, 75-V power supply, 4-pin Molex power supply connector, and 8-pin Molex communication cable.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby text lists replacement part, PPE, tools, laptop, USB-A to micro-USB cable, 25-V power supply, 75-V power supply, 4-pin Molex power supply connector, and 8-pin Molex communication cable.

steps.title: Identify the Teknic SD motor to be backed up
steps.purpose: Confirm the correct motor is selected before saving parameters.
steps.instruction: Identify the Teknic SD motor to be worked on. The source notes the Z-axis and A-axis motors are mounted into gearboxes which may also be replaced.
steps.expected_result: The correct Teknic SD motor is identified for parameter backup.
steps.healthy_condition: The technician can distinguish the Teknic SD motor and understands its association with the gearbox assembly.
steps.failure_condition: The motor cannot be confidently identified or distinguished from the associated gearbox assembly.

actions.label: Identify motor
actions.exact_action: Identify the Teknic SD motor to be worked on; the source notes the Z-axis and A-axis motors are mounted into gearboxes which may also be replaced.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use Figure 7-5 to identify the Teknic SD motor referenced by the procedure.
Use the gearbox figure as supporting context to distinguish the motor from the associated gearbox assembly.
Use the gearbox figure as supporting context where gearbox-associated work is involved.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the correct Teknic SD motor cannot be identified.
Escalate if it is unclear whether the work applies to the motor, the gearbox, or both.

source_evidence.text: Identify the Teknic SD motor to be worked on; the source notes the Z-axis and A-axis motors are mounted into gearboxes which may also be replaced.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 7-5 identifies the Teknic SD motor. Nearby text states Teknic SD motors used on the Z-axis and A-axis are mounted into gearboxes.
Figure 7-5 appears on page 121 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_7_3_5_1_teknic_software_download.

steps.title: Connect the motor for software access
steps.purpose: Establish the physical connection needed for the manufacturer application to access the motor.
steps.instruction: Connect a cable to the motor so the motor can be accessed by the manufacturer application.
steps.expected_result: The motor is physically connected for access by the manufacturer application.
steps.healthy_condition: The motor connection is established and ready for software access.
steps.failure_condition: The motor cannot be connected or is not accessible to the manufacturer application.

actions.label: Connect motor cable
actions.exact_action: Connect a cable to the motor so the motor can be accessed by the manufacturer application.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the motor USB access point or USB port cover referenced as the likely connection location for the laptop cable.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the motor cannot be connected.
Escalate if the manufacturer application cannot access the motor after connection.

source_evidence.text: Connect a cable to the motor so the motor can be accessed by the manufacturer application.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby text describes connecting a USB cable to the motor and laptop and references a labeled USB PORT COVER.

steps.title: Download the Teknic manufacturer application
steps.purpose: Obtain the software required to save the motor's custom parameters.
steps.instruction: Download the manufacturer application from https://teknic.com/downloads/.
steps.expected_result: The Teknic manufacturer application is available for use.
steps.healthy_condition: The application download page is reached and the software can be obtained.
steps.failure_condition: The application cannot be downloaded from the specified site.

actions.label: Open Teknic downloads site
actions.exact_action: Download the manufacturer application from https://teknic.com/downloads/.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Teknic software cannot be obtained from the specified site.
Escalate if access to the download site is unavailable.

source_evidence.text: Download the manufacturer application from https://teknic.com/downloads/.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby text references the Teknic download site for the software download.

steps.title: Select the required software options
steps.purpose: Ensure the correct Teknic software package is chosen for the motor type identified by the source.
steps.instruction: In the download selections, choose "ClearPath," "SD" for the motor type, and "NEMA 23/34 IP53 Motor Body."
steps.expected_result: The software download is configured with the source-specified selections.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected software options match ClearPath, SD motor type, and NEMA 23/34 IP53 Motor Body.
steps.failure_condition: The required selections are unavailable or a different software package is selected.

actions.label: Choose software options
actions.exact_action: In the download selections, choose "ClearPath," "SD" for the motor type, and "NEMA 23/34 IP53 Motor Body."

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the specified selections cannot be made.
Escalate if the available Teknic download options do not match the source.

source_evidence.text: In the download selections, choose "ClearPath," "SD" for the motor type, and "NEMA 23/34 IP53 Motor Body."

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby text instructs users to select ClearPath, SD motor type, and NEMA 23/34 IP53 Motor Body.

steps.title: Run the application and save custom parameters
steps.purpose: Preserve the motor's custom parameters before replacement work proceeds.
steps.instruction: Run the manufacturer application to save the motor's custom parameters.
steps.expected_result: The motor's custom parameters are saved before replacement work proceeds.
steps.healthy_condition: The application can access the motor and the custom parameters are saved successfully.
steps.failure_condition: The application cannot access the motor or the custom parameters cannot be saved.

actions.label: Save motor parameters
actions.exact_action: Run the manufacturer application to save the motor's custom parameters.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the Teknic SD motor figure as confirmation of the motor type associated with the parameter save task.
Use the page 122 image as supporting context for the motor USB connection used during configuration transfer.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the motor cannot be connected or its custom parameters cannot be saved using the manufacturer application.
Escalate because the source indicates the parameters should be saved before replacement.

source_evidence.text: Run the manufacturer application to save the motor's custom parameters.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Nearby text states that each motor has custom parameters that should be saved by connecting to the motor and running the manufacturer application.
Nearby text describes running the Teknic ClearPath application and using File > Save Configuration to create an .mtr file.

success_criteria: The Teknic manufacturer application is obtained with the specified selections.
The Teknic SD motor is connected and accessible to the manufacturer application.
The motor's custom parameters are saved before replacement work proceeds.
healthy_conditions: The correct Teknic SD motor is identified.
All required PPE, tools, power supplies, and cables are available.
The Teknic download selections match ClearPath, SD motor type, and NEMA 23/34 IP53 Motor Body.
The manufacturer application successfully saves the motor's custom parameters.
failure_conditions: The correct motor cannot be identified.
Required tools, PPE, or connection hardware are missing.
The motor cannot be connected to the manufacturer application.
The Teknic software cannot be downloaded with the specified selections.
The motor's custom parameters cannot be saved before replacement.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the motor cannot be connected or its custom parameters cannot be saved using the manufacturer application.
Escalate if safe handling of heavy components cannot be ensured.
Escalate if the available Teknic software selections do not match the source-backed selections.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Identify the Teknic SD motor referenced by the procedure.
Locate the likely motor USB access point used for laptop connection and configuration transfer.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Figure 7-5 appears on page 121 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_7_3_5_1_teknic_software_download.

missing_details: The supplied source packet does not provide explicit motor removal or installation steps.
The supplied source packet does not provide a source-backed estimated time.
The supplied source packet does not explicitly state whether production stop or LOTO is required for this parameter backup activity.
The supplied source packet does not provide detailed connection sequencing for the listed 25-V and 75-V power supplies and Molex connectors.
The supplied source packet does not include the full OCR text of the referenced sections.
